name: rkdeveloptool-gui
description: Cross-platform Electron GUI for rkdeveloptool firmware updates.
author: OpenIPC contributors

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/no-device-preload.js && node --check src/renderer.js && node --check src/lib.js && node --check src/simulationRunner.js && node --check src/toolRunner.js && node --check src/windowFactory.js && node --check scripts/stage-rkdeveloptool.js && node --check scripts/capture-doc-screenshots.js && node --check tests/lib.test.js && node --check tests/integration.test.js && node --check tests/layout.test.js && node --check tests/simulation.test.js && node --check tests/windowFactory.test.js && node --check tests/fixtures/mock-rkdeveloptool.js
scripts.dist:linux:x64: npm run stage:rkdeveloptool && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm --x64
scripts.dist:linux:arm64: npm run stage:rkdeveloptool && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --arm64
